mapper.select: select from card_logs where card_id = #{cardId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by created_at DESC

SELECT cl.id as id, cl.card_id as cardId, cr.title as cardTitle, cl.action as action, cl.operator_ip as operatorIp, cl.created_at as createdAt FROM card_logs cl LEFT JOIN cards cr ON cl.card_id = cr.id AND cr.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE cl.card_id = #{cardId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY cl.created_at DESC

SELECT cl.id as id, cl.card_id as cardId, cr.title as cardTitle, cl.action as action, cl.operator_ip as operatorIp, cl.created_at as createdAt, s.label as sidebarLabel, c.name as category FROM card_logs cl LEFT JOIN cards cr ON cl.card_id = cr.id AND cr.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN sidebar s ON cr.sidebar_id = s.id LEFT JOIN category c ON cr.category_id = c.id ORDER BY cl.created_at DESC LIMIT 200
mapper.insert: insert into card_logs (id, card_id, action, operator_ip, created_at) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cardId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{action,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into card_logs
id, card_id, action, operator_ip, created_at,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cardId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{action,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
